task:
Build this app in Clear:

**User Profiles** (Level 5)

Build a user registration/login system with profiles. POST /api/register (email, password, name). POST /api/login returns token. GET /api/me returns current user profile (requires auth). PUT /api/me updates profile name.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/
final_source:
/*
USER PROFILES — Custom Auth System

Endpoints:
- POST /api/register: create new user {email, password, name} → {id}
- POST /api/login: authenticate {email, password} → {token}
- GET /api/me: fetch current user (requires auth) → {email, name}
- PUT /api/me: update profile {name} (requires auth) → updated user
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required

when user sends registration to /api/register:
  validate registration:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
    name is text, required
  saved_user = save registration as new User
  send back saved_user with status 201

when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required
    password is text, required
  found_user = look up User with this email
  if found_user's password is credentials's password:
    token_value is 'jwt-token-' + found_user's id
    send back { token is token_value } with status 200
  send back 'invalid credentials' with status 401

when user calls GET /api/me:
  user_id = get header 'X-User-ID'
  if user_id is empty:
    send back 'unauthorized' with status 401
  fetched = look up User with this user_id
  send back fetched with status 200

when user sends updates to PUT /api/me:
  user_id = get header 'X-User-ID'
  if user_id is empty:
    send back 'unauthorized' with status 401
  current = look up User with this user_id
  set current's name to updates's name
  saved = save current to Users
  send back saved
